strategy: Lightbane resists all damage 300%, so you cannot simply hit him down; the fight is about matching the active phase and forcing his minion to Sacrifice.
Each cycle he announces a phase ('Beware, my thrall, of ...') and summons a themed Shadow minion. Read the phase before you cast.
Do not cast the phase's own spell type; casting the wrong type for the active phase triggers a punish cast from Lightbane, such as a Heal in the Healing phase triggering Blessing on his minion.
Cast the exact opposite spell type of the active minion to force it to Sacrifice for 20% of its Health, whittling it down, though this raises his backlash by +10.

He opens Round 1 with an accelerated Shadow AoE (Dark Nova, Dark Shepherd, or Dark Fiend) backed by a +40% Shadowblade, Shadowspear, and a Shadow Trap, and repeats it after attacking, so keep your Health buffered.
Coordinate as a team so each wizard casts the correct counter-type without tripping the wrong-type punish.
cheatNotes: He opens Round 1 with an accelerated Shadow AoE (Dark Nova, Dark Shepherd, or Dark Fiend) and repeats it after every attack.
The opening is buffed: he adds a +40% Shadowblade at the end of Round 1, then Shadowspear and a Shadow Trap on Round 2 before hitting.
He summons a themed Shadow minion whose type dictates which spells he casts each cycle.
The summon-and-cast pattern repeats every two Rounds.
Healing phase: he summons Seraph of Salvation to counter your heals.
During the Healing phase he spends turns casting Minor Blessing and Fairy.
Those support heals land on his minion, keeping it alive.
Damage phase: he summons Frenzied Shrike.
During the Damage phase he casts Super Shadowplume and a Shadow Headless Horseman.
HOT phase: he summons Mending Trickster.
During the HOT phase he casts Vitamins and Regenerate.
DoT phase: he summons Sly Trickster.
During the DoT phase he casts a Shadow Storm Elf and Heck Hound.
Charm phase: he summons Charming Trickster.
During the Charm phase he casts Dragonblade and Chromatic Blast.
Curse phase: he summons Cursed Shrike.
During the Curse phase he casts Weakness and Virulent Plague.
Ward phase: he summons Mighty Sentinel.
During the Ward phase he casts Tower Shield and Frozen Armor.
Jinx/Trap phase: he summons Trapper Shrike.
During the Trap phase he casts Hex and a +70% Mass Feint.
Pacify phase: he summons Mollifying Sentinel.
During the Pacify phase he casts Pacify and Tranquilize.
Threat phase: he summons Mocking Sentinel.
During the Taunt phase he casts Taunt and Mega Taunt.
Global phase: he summons Seraph of Sacred Ground.
During the Global phase he casts Doom and Gloom and a Shadow Global.
Aura phase: he summons Seraph of Blessings.
During the Aura phase he casts Frenzy and 5-pip Frenzy.
Casting the wrong spell type for the active phase triggers a punish cast from Lightbane, listed below.
Casting a Heal triggers Blessing on his minion.
Casting Damage triggers Super Shadowplume.
Casting a Heal over Time triggers Sprite on his minion.
Casting a Damage over Time triggers Scald.
Casting a Blade triggers Balanceblade.
Casting a negative damage Charm triggers Plague.
Casting a Shield triggers Legion Shield.
Casting a Trap triggers Mass Hex.
Casting a Pacify triggers Subdue.
Casting a Taunt triggers Taunt.
Casting a Global triggers a Shadow Global.
Casting an Aura triggers Frenzy.
Casting the exact opposite spell type of the active minion makes it Sacrifice for 20% of its Health but raises the boss's backlash by +10.
